description: Shared budget contract for all agent sessions. AAA defines, A-FORGE enforces, arifOS judges.
notes: DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI — Forged, Not Given
AAA is cockpit seed. A-FORGE is engine shell. arifOS is law.
A-FORGE must NOT execute without a valid budget contract loaded.
On violation: A-FORGE emits 888_HOLD, logs to RunLedger, awaits human ack.
